title: UK Roads
description: A mod that adds UK-style roads to the game!
body:
The mod currently contains:

- Double & single yellow lines

- Double & single white centre lines

- Edge white lines 


THIS PROJECT IS ABANDONED, DON'T ASK FOR UPDATES OR FEATURE ADDITIONS.
Instead, use Mishang Urban Construction: [https://modrinth.com/mod/mishang-urban-construction](https://modrinth.com/mod/mishang-urban-construction)
